title: Commentary on Investments: As of December 31, 2026
content:
Total investments increased to $112,852 as of March 31, 2026, reflecting a 2.7% increase from the previous period. The portfolio remains conservatively structured and continues to be heavily weighted toward available-for-sale debt securities, which total $110,212 and represent virtually the entire investment portfolio, providing stable income and liquidity support.

Other investments totaled $356 and remain immaterial relative to the overall portfolio. Time deposits declined to $2,285 from the previous period, reflecting a 23.2% decrease that reduced earning asset base while maintaining conservative balance sheet management.
The investment maturity structure remains well distributed across multiple time horizons, supporting effective liquidity management and interest rate risk control through a balanced mix of short-term and longer-duration instruments that provide flexibility in meeting deposit obligations without compromising yield objectives.
Overall, the credit union's investment portfolio remains conservative, liquid, and aligned with policy guidelines. Management continues to emphasize capital preservation, stable yield generation, and prudent duration management while maintaining flexibility to respond to changing balance-sheet needs and market opportunities.
